name: Brainstorm Skill Chain
description: 4-phase brainstorming with dual-mode routing: auto (multi-role) or single-role analysis

D_MODE.name: Brainstorm Mode Selection
D_MODE.prompt:
Select brainstorm mode based on phase 1 analysis:
1. Auto — multi-role brainstorm with artifact generation, then role analysis, then synthesis
2. Single — single-role focused analysis, then synthesis

Consider: user preference, topic complexity, time constraints.

D_SYNTH.name: Synthesis Decision
D_SYNTH.prompt:
Determine synthesis path based on brainstorm mode and results:
1. Proceed — multi-role analysis complete, synthesize all perspectives
2. Complete — single-role analysis done, finalize without full synthesis

Consider: number of roles analyzed, depth of analysis, user intent.

choices.label: Proceed
choices.description: Full synthesis of all role perspectives
